name: Metabase
description: Query PushPress data and pull live metrics

instructions:
To get a Metabase API key:
  1. Open Slack → #support-data
  2. Send this message:
       "Hi @data I need a metabase API key for Claude Cowork.
        Can you send me one?"
     💬 https://pushpress.slack.com/channels/support-data
  3. The data team will create a key and send it to you via 1Password.

env.credential_prompt: Paste your Metabase API key (or Enter to skip):

name: GitHub (PushPress Code)
description: Search and read PushPress source code (read-only)

instructions: Create a read-only GitHub token (takes ~60 seconds):
5. Permissions → Contents: Read-only, Metadata: Read-only, Pull requests: Read-only

env.credential_prompt: Paste the GitHub token (or Enter to skip):
